headline: China’s Antimony Ban Sent Prices Up 2,600%. Rare Earths Are Next
summary: In August 2024, China sparked a crisis by restricting antimony exports; now, they are doing the same to rare earths… but this time, one company saw it coming.

raw.headline: China’s Antimony Ban Sent Prices Up 2,600%. Rare Earths Are Next

headline: RTX vs. General Dynamics: Which Defense Contractor Offers More Upside?
summary: RTX vs. General Dynamics: Both defense giants ride rising budgets and strong backlogs, but one shows stronger growth prospects, investments and execution.
